dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6773 IH: Databases of Publicly Owned Land Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Waters introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Financial Services

form.official-title: To amend the Housing and Community Development Act of 1974 to require that grantees of the Community Development Block Grant program maintain a database of publicly owned land.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Databases of Publicly Owned Land Act.

subsection.text: Section 104(b) of the Housing and Community Development Act of 1974 (42 U.S.C. 5304(b)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in paragraph (5), by striking and at the end;
in paragraph (6), by striking the period at the end and inserting ; and; and
by adding at the end the following:
the grantee maintains, on a publicly accessible website, a searchable database that identifies all parcels of undeveloped land owned by the grantee.

subsection.text: The amendments made by this section shall take effect on October 1, 2026.
